summary: Comprehensive testing of the overhauled ticketing system for LEAMSS Portal. All 4 user roles (Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client) can now create tickets and assign them to specific users. The TicketSection component is integrated in all 4 portals with proper navigation.

frontend_ui_tests.login_page: PASSED - Loads correctly with demo credentials

case_manager_dashboard.support_tickets_nav: PASSED - Nav item present in sidebar
case_manager_dashboard.ticket_section: PASSED - TicketSection component renders with stats
case_manager_dashboard.create_ticket_dialog: PASSED - Shows clients and admin escalation option
case_manager_dashboard.ticket_detail_view: PASSED - Shows messages and status buttons

partner_dashboard.support_tickets_nav: PASSED - Nav item present in sidebar
partner_dashboard.create_ticket_dialog: PASSED - Shows only admin as recipient (correct)

client_dashboard.create_ticket_dialog: PASSED - Shows case manager and admin as recipients

admin_dashboard.tickets_nav: PASSED - Nav item with badge count
admin_dashboard.ticket_section: PASSED - Shows all tickets with filters

frontend_ui_tests.end_to_end_ticket_creation: PASSED - Created ticket via UI with admin escalation

features_verified: Case Manager can create ticket and assign to specific clients - VERIFIED
Case Manager can create ticket and escalate to Admin - VERIFIED
Client can create ticket and send to Case Manager or Admin - VERIFIED
Partner can create ticket and send to Admin - VERIFIED
All 4 portals show the Support Tickets section with proper navigation - VERIFIED
Ticket recipient list loads correctly based on user role via /api/users/ticket-recipients - VERIFIED
/api/tickets/my-tickets returns tickets for the logged-in user - VERIFIED
Ticket creation flow works end-to-end - VERIFIED
Ticket detail view shows messages and allows replies - VERIFIED
Ticket status updates work (open -> in_progress -> resolved -> closed) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: TicketSection.jsx is properly integrated in all 4 dashboards
Role-based recipient filtering works correctly (Partner only sees Admin, Client sees CM + Admin, CM sees Clients + Admin)
Ticket status workflow enforces resolution note requirement for resolved/closed status
seed_data_creation: Test tickets created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticketing system overhaul is complete and working. All 4 user roles can create tickets with role-appropriate recipients. The /api/users/ticket-recipients endpoint returns different recipients based on user role: Admin sees all users, Case Manager sees their clients + admins, Client sees their case manager + admins, Partner sees only admins. TicketSection component is integrated in all dashboards. Test tickets prefixed with TEST_ were created during testing.
